compiled_state.title: Remove v2 fallback paths and TK variable from enrich-file-impact.sh and error-sweep.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Depends on 1e54-d343 (RED test task). Make failing tests GREEN.

Tests to make GREEN:
- test_error_sweep_no_tk_list_call
- test_error_sweep_no_tk_create_call
- test_error_sweep_uses_ticket_cli
- test_enrich_file_impact_no_TK_variable
- test_enrich_file_impact_no_v2_fallback_branch
- test_enrich_file_impact_no_use_v3_variable

## Implementation Steps

### enrich-file-impact.sh changes:

1. Remove TK variable (line 18): `TK="${TK:-$SCRIPT_DIR/tk}"`
   Add: `TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket}"`

2. Replace v2 fallback in ticket loading (lines 49-57):
   Current:
   ```bash
   if [ -n "${TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$TICKET_CMD" ]; then
       output=$("$TICKET_CMD" show "$ID" 2>/dev/null) || output=""
   elif [ -n "${TICKETS_DIR:-}" ] && [ -f "${TICKETS_DIR}/${ID}.md" ]; then
       output=$(cat "${TICKETS_DIR}/${ID}.md" 2>/dev/null) || output=""
   else
       output=$("$TK" show "$ID" 2>/dev/null) || output=""
   fi
   ```
   Replace with:
   ```bash
   TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket}"
   output=$("$TICKET_CMD" show "$ID" 2>/dev/null) || output=""
   ```

3. Remove _use_v3 detection (lines 188-211) and v2 append path. Keep v3 append path.
   Collapse to v3-only ticket comment call.

### error-sweep.sh changes:

1. Replace `tk list --type bug --status open` (lines 153, 222) with:
   `ticket list 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; [print(t["ticket_id"]+" "+t.get("title","")) for t in json.load(sys.stdin) if t.get("ticket_type")=="bug" and t.get("status") in ("open","in_progress")]'`
   Resolve TICKET_CMD at top of script.

2. Replace `tk create "..."` calls (lines 168, 227) with:
   `"$TICKET_CMD" create bug "..."`
   Note: ticket create syntax is: ticket create <type> <title> [parent_id] [options]
   Arguments are positional, not flags.

3. Add TICKET_CMD resolution at top of error-sweep.sh:
   `TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../scripts/ticket}"`
   (Adjust path relative to skills/end-session/ location; verify with: readlink -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../..")

## Files Modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh (Edit)
- plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No TK= in enrich-file-impact.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '^TK=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh
- [ ] No _use_v3 in enrich-file-impact.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '_use_v3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/enrich-file-impact.sh
- [ ] No tk list or tk create in error-sweep.sh
  Verify: ! grep -qE 'tk list|tk create' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh
- [ ] RED tests from 1e54-d343 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-end-session-error-sweep.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AC AMENDMENT: error-sweep.sh currently calls 'tk create "$ticket_title" -t bug -p 2 -d "$description"'. The ticket CLI does NOT support -d flag for description. After migration to 'ticket create bug "$title"', the description would be silently dropped.

Fix: After creating the ticket, immediately follow with 'ticket comment <id> "$description"' to add the description as a comment.

Pattern for sweep_tool_errors():
  new_id=$("$TICKET_CMD" create bug "$ticket_title" --priority 2)
  if [ -n "$new_id" ]; then
    "$TICKET_CMD" comment "$new_id" "$description"
  fi

Add AC criterion:
- [ ] Bug tickets created by error-sweep.sh include description (via ticket comment after create)
  Verify: grep -A3 'TICKET_CMD.*create bug' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/end-session/error-sweep.sh | grep -q 'comment'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
